description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Android that runs on push to the master branch and on pull request open and synchronize events, ignoring changes to markdown files and docs. The workflow should concurrently build the project, cancelling any in-progress runs. Use an ubuntu-latest job that installs gettext, checks out the repository, sets up JDK 17, caches the CMake build folder, builds the project with Gradle, uploads the debug APK as an artifact if not in an Actions test environment, and cleans up build artifacts.
